name: Lúcio
description: A sustained Healer who gives his team mobility and peels enemies off allies.
title: Freedom Fighting DJ
info: From the streets of Rio to the clubs on King's Row, Lúcio's beats bring the party to life, and drive the people to action. Now he's on tour in the Nexus, ready to break it down, and to continue fighting for what's right.

Lucio.name: Soundwave
Lucio.description: Deal 105 (+4% per level) damage to enemies in an area and knock them back.

Lucio.name: Crossfade
Lucio.description: Currently playing Speed Boost, increasing the Movement Speed of Lúcio and nearby allied Heroes by 10%.  Toggle to play Healing Boost instead.

Lucio.name: Amp It Up
Lucio.description: Raise Lúcio's Crossfade track volume for 3 seconds, amping Healing Boost to 112 (+4% per level) Health per second and Speed Boost to 30% increased Movement Speed.

Lucio.name: Sound Barrier
Lucio.description: After 1 second, Lúcio and nearby allied Heroes gain a 1296 (+4% per level) point Shield that rapidly decays over 6 seconds.

Lucio.name: High Five
Lucio.description: Quickly skate to an allied Hero. Upon arrival the ally is healed for 230 (+4% per level), Lúcio is healed for 80 (+4% per level), and both gain Unstoppable for 1 second.

Lucio.name: Push Off
Lucio.description: While moving alongside terrain, activate to slide towards a targeted location. Enemies hit take 100 (+4% per level) damage and are Slowed by 75% for 1 second.

Lucio.name: Wall Ride
Lucio.description: When moving alongside terrain, Lúcio begins to Wall Ride for 2 seconds. While Wall Ride is active, Lúcio can walk through units and gains 20% Movement Speed that stacks with other bonuses.

1.name: Party Mix
1.description: Quest: Play Lúcio's Crossfade tracks to nearby allies. Multiple allies provide additional time.  Reward: For every 1 Minute played, permanently increase Lúcio's maximum Mana by 10.  Reward: Once you have played for 8 minutes or more, permanently increase Crossfade's radius by 20%.

1.name: Accelerando
1.description: Wall Ride's Movement Speed bonus gradually increases to 40% over 6 seconds while Lúcio maintains its effect.

1.name: Smooth Moves
1.description: While Wall Ride is active, Basic Attacks heal for 30% of the damage dealt and restore 0.5 Mana.  Passive: Increase Wall Ride duration by 1 second.

4.name: Subwoofer
4.description: Enemies within the first half of Soundwave's range are knocked back 75% further.  Quest: Hit 3 enemy Heroes with a single Soundwave.  Reward: Increase Soundwave's arc by 50% and its range by 20%.

4.name: Off the Wall
4.description: Hitting an enemy with Soundwave while Wall Ride is active sets its cooldown to 5 seconds and refunds 15 Mana.

4.name: Supersonic
4.description: While Wall Ride is active, Push Off's cooldown recharges 100% faster.

7.name: Good Vibrations
7.description: Hitting an enemy with Soundwave grants Lúcio a 38 (+4% per level) Shield for 8 seconds. Hitting enemy Heroes grants 3 times this amount.

7.name: Reverse Amp
7.description: Blast Lúcio's active Crossfade track at enemy Heroes. While Amp It Up is active, Healing Boost deals 50 (+4% per level) damage per second and Speed Boost Slows by 20%.  This ability is unaffected by Crossfade talents.

7.name: Boombox
7.description: Place a boombox that plays Lúcio's active Crossfade track. Its volume adjusts with Amp It Up. Allied Heroes near the boombox gain 5 Armor.  Crossfade tracks from Lúcio and the Boombox do not stack.

10.name: Sound Barrier
10.description: After 1 second, Lúcio and nearby allied Heroes gain a 1296 (+4% per level) point Shield that rapidly decays over 6 seconds.

10.name: High Five
10.description: Quickly skate to an allied Hero. Upon arrival the ally is healed for 230 (+4% per level), Lúcio is healed for 80 (+4% per level), and both gain Unstoppable for 1 second.

13.name: All Together
13.description: For each ally affected by Crossfade, Lúcio gains 5% Movement Speed that stacks with other bonuses.

13.name: Heavy Casters
13.description: Push Off no longer Slows the first Hero hit, and instead Stuns them for 0.5 seconds.

13.name: Slip
13.description: While Wall Ride is active, passing near an enemy Hero increases its Movement Speed bonus to 40%, and grants 15 Armor, for 1 second.

16.name: Rejuvenescência
16.description: While Amp It Up is active, Crossfade's Healing Boost heals for an additional 2.5% of the target's maximum Health each second.

16.name: Up the Frequency
16.description: Hitting enemy Heroes with Basic Attacks reduces the cooldown of Amp It Up by 0.3 seconds.  Passive: Wall Ride increases Basic Attack range by 2.2.

16.name: Up To Eleven
16.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with Soundwave or Push Off increases the duration of Amp It Up.  Soundwave grants 0.5 seconds and Push Off grants 1 second. If Amp It Up is not active, these bonuses are granted to its next activation, up to 3 seconds.  Passive: Increase the duration of Amp It Up by 1 second.

20.name: Bossa Nova
20.description: Reduce the cooldown of Sound Barrier to 30 seconds, but the Shield now decays over 4 seconds.

20.name: Mixing Fire
20.description: High Five can now be cast on enemy Heroes, dealing 160 (+4% per level) damage and reducing all healing received by 50% for 3 seconds.  Passive: Reduce the cost and cooldown of High Five by 30%.

20.name: House Party
20.description: For each ally affected by Crossfade, Lúcio gains 8% increased healing.

20.name: Summer Anthem
20.description: Activate for allies affected by Crossfade to become Unkillable for 1.5 seconds.

tooltipMarkup.LucioAmpItUp: Raise Lúcio's Crossfade track volume for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,LucioAmpItUp,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds, amping <c val="FFF800">Healing Boost</c> to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,LucioAmpItUpCrossfadeHealingBoostHeal,RechargeVitalRate*8"/></c> Health per second and <c val="3DFF7F">Speed Boost</c> to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="(Effect,LucioAmpItUpSpeedBoostModifyPlayerOn,EffectArray[0].Value)*100"/>%</c> increased Movement Speed.
tooltipMarkup.LucioAmpItUpRejuvenescencia: While Amp It Up is active, Crossfade's <c val="FFF800">Healing Boost</c> heals for an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,LucioAmpItUpRejuvenescencia,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value*(1/Behavior,LucioCrossfadeHealingBoost,Period)*100"precision="2"/>%</c> of the target's maximum Health each second.
tooltipMarkup.LucioAmpItUpUpTheFrequency: Hitting enemy Heroes with Basic Attacks reduces the cooldown of Amp It Up by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,LucioAmpItUpUpTheFrequencyModifyCooldown,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse*(-1)" precision="2"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Wall Ride increases Basic Attack range by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">2.2</c>.
tooltipMarkup.LucioAmpItUpUpToEleven: Hitting an enemy Hero with Soundwave or Push Off increases the duration of Amp It Up.<n/><n/>Soundwave grants <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,LucioAmpItUpUpToElevenModfifyBehaviorDuration,Value" precision="2"/></c> seconds and Push Off grants <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,LucioAmpItUpUpToElevenModfifyBehaviorDurationPushOff,Value" precision="2"/></c> second. If Amp It Up is not active, these bonuses are granted to its next activation, up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,LucioAmpItUpUpToElevenModfifyBehaviorDuration,Value*Behavior,LucioAmpItUpUpToElevenReservoirTokenCounter,Max" precision="2"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Increase the duration of Amp It Up by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,LucioAmpItUpUpToEleven,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"/></c> second.
tooltipMarkup.LucioBoomboxBoombox: Place a boombox that plays Lúcio's active Crossfade track. Its volume adjusts with Amp It Up. Allied Heroes near the boombox gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,LucioBoomboxArmorBehavior,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/></c> Armor.<n/><n/>Crossfade tracks from Lúcio and the Boombox do not stack.
tooltipMarkup.LucioCrossfadeActivateHealingBoost: Currently playing <c val="3DFF7F">Speed Boost</c>, increasing the Movement Speed of Lúcio and nearby allied Heroes by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,LucioCrossfadeSpeedBoost,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*100"Player="0"/>%</c>.<n/><n/>Toggle to play <c val="FFF800">Healing Boost</c> instead.
tooltipMarkup.LucioCrossfadeAllTogether: For each ally affected by Crossfade, Lúcio gains <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Accumulator,LucioCrossfadeAllTogetherMovementSpeedAccumulator,Scale/Unit,HeroLucio,Speed" player="0"/>%</c> Movement Speed that stacks with other bonuses.
tooltipMarkup.LucioCrossfadePartyMix: Quest: Play Lúcio's Crossfade tracks to nearby allies. Multiple allies provide additional time.Reward: For every 1 Minute played, permanently increase Lúcio's maximum Mana by 10. Reward: Once you have played for minutes or more, permanently increase Crossfade's radius by %.
tooltipMarkup.LucioHighFive: Quickly skate to an allied Hero. Upon arrival the ally is healed for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,LucioHighFiveCreateHealer,RechargeVitalRate"/></c>, Lúcio is healed for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,LucioHighFiveSelfHealCreateHealer,RechargeVitalRate"/></c>, and both gain Unstoppable for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,LucioHighFiveUnstoppable,Duration"/></c> second.
tooltipMarkup.LucioHighFiveMixingFire: High Five can now be cast on enemy Heroes, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,LucioHighFiveMixingFireDamage,Amount"/></c> damage and reducing all healing received by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,LucioHighFiveMixingFireHealingReduction,Modification.HealTakenAdditiveMultiplier[0]"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,LucioHighFiveMixingFireHealingReduction,Duration"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Reduce the cost and cooldown of High Five by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*(1-Talent,LucioCrossfadeMixingFire,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[3].Value))"/></c>%.
tooltipMarkup.LucioItemSummerAnthem: Activate for allies affected by Crossfade to become Unkillable for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,LucioSummerAnthemUnkillableBehavior,Duration"precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.LucioPassiveHouseParty: For each ally affected by Crossfade, Lúcio gains <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Accumulator,LucioCrossfadeHousePartyAccumulator,Scale"/>%</c> increased healing.
tooltipMarkup.LucioPassiveSmoothMoves: While Wall Ride is active, Basic Attacks heal for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,LucioSmoothMovesLeechBehavior,Modification.VitalDamageLeechArray[Life].KindArray[Basic]"/>%</c> of the damage dealt and restore <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,LucioSmoothMovesCreateManaHealer,RechargeVitalRate" precision = "2"/></c> Mana.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Increase Wall Ride duration by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,LucioPassiveSmoothMoves,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value"/></c> second.
tooltipMarkup.LucioPushOff: While moving alongside terrain, activate to slide towards a targeted location. Enemies hit take <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,LucioPushOffDamage,Amount"/></c> damage and are Slowed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,LucioPushOffSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,LucioPushOffSlow,Duration"precision="2"/></c> second.
tooltipMarkup.LucioPushOffHeavyCasters: Push Off no longer Slows the first Hero hit, and instead Stuns them for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,LucioPushOffHeavyCastersStun,Duration"Precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.LucioPushOffSupersonic: While Wall Ride is active, Push Off's cooldown recharges <c val="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> faster.
tooltipMarkup.LucioReverseAmp: Blast Lúcio's active Crossfade track at enemy Heroes. While Amp It Up is active, <c val="FFF800">Healing Boost</c> deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,LucioReverseAmpDamage,Amount*(1/Behavior,LucioReverseAmpDamageBehavior,Period)"/></c> damage per second and <c val="3DFF7F">Speed Boost</c> Slows by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,LucioReverseAmpSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*(-100)"/>%</c>.<n/><n/>This ability is unaffected by Crossfade talents.
tooltipMarkup.LucioSoundBarrier: After <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,LucioSoundBarrierDelay,Duration"/></c> second, Lúcio and nearby allied Heroes gain a <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,LucioSoundBarrierShield,DamageResponse.ModifyLimit*Behavior,LucioSoundBarrierShield,MaxStackCount"/></c> point Shield that rapidly decays over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,LucioSoundBarrierShield,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.LucioSoundBarrierBossaNova: Reduce the cooldown of Sound Barrier to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,LucioSoundBarrierCastCompleteModifyUnit,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse+Talent,LucioSoundBarrierBossaNova,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value" player="0"/></c> seconds, but the Shield now decays over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,LucioSoundBarrierBossaNovaShield,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.LucioSoundwave: Deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,LucioSoundwaveDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to enemies in an area and knock them back.
tooltipMarkup.LucioSoundwaveGoodVibrations: Hitting an enemy with Soundwave grants Lúcio a <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,LucioSoundwaveGoodVibrationsShield,DamageResponse.ModifyLimit"/></c> Shield for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,LucioSoundwaveGoodVibrationsShield,Duration"/></c> seconds. Hitting enemy Heroes grants <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,LucioSoundwaveGoodVibrationsApplyShieldBehaviorHero,Count"/></c> times this amount.
tooltipMarkup.LucioSoundwaveOffTheWall: Hitting an enemy with Soundwave while Wall Ride is active sets its cooldown to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,LucioSoundwaveOffTheWallModifyUnit,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"/></c> seconds and refunds <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,LucioSoundwaveOffTheWallRefundMana,RechargeVitalRate"/></c> Mana.
tooltipMarkup.LucioSoundwaveSubwoofer: Enemies within the first half of Soundwave's range are knocked back 75% further.Quest: Hit 3 enemy Heroes with a single Soundwave.Reward: Increase Soundwave's arc by % and its range by %.
tooltipMarkup.LucioWallRide: When moving alongside terrain, Lúcio begins to Wall Ride for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,LucioWallRideSpeed,Duration"player="0"/></c> seconds. While Wall Ride is active, Lúcio can walk through units and gains <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,LucioWallRideSpeed,Modification.MoveSpeedBonus/Unit,HeroLucio,Speed*100"/>%</c> Movement Speed that stacks with other bonuses.
tooltipMarkup.LucioWallRideAccelerando: Wall Ride's Movement Speed bonus gradually increases to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="(Accumulator,LucioWallRideAccelerandoTokenAccumulator,MaxAccumulation/Unit,HeroLucio,Speed)+(Behavior,LucioWallRideSpeed,Modification.MoveSpeedBonus/Unit,HeroLucio,Speed)*100" player="0"/>%</c> over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,LucioWallRideAccelerandoToken,Max*Behavior,LucioWallRideSpeed,Period"/></c> seconds while Lúcio maintains its effect.
tooltipMarkup.LucioWallRideSlip: While Wall Ride is active, passing near an enemy Hero increases its Movement Speed bonus to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,LucioWallRideSlip,Modification.MoveSpeedBonus+Behavior,LucioWallRideSpeed,Modification.MoveSpeedBonus/Unit,HeroLucio,Speed*100" player="0"/>%</c>, and grants <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,LucioWallRideSlip,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/></c> Armor, for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,LucioWallRideSlip,Duration"/></c> second.
